scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --prefix backend" "npm run test --prefix frontend"
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test --prefix backend -- --watch" "npm run test --prefix frontend -- --watch"
scripts.test:load: concurrently "npx cross-env PORT=5001 NODE_ENV=loadtest SESSION_SECRET=testing123 node backend/server.js" "npx artillery run backend/tests/load/test.yml"
